channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles QB Jalen Hurts clears concussion protocol and will start wild-card game against Green Bay
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Out of NFL concussion protocol, Jalen Hurts is ready to roll for the Eagles. With Hurts back, the NFC East champion Eagles (14-3) should be close to full strength in the starting lineup for their NFC wild-card game Sunday against Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Lamar Jackson repeats and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for AP All-Pro
item.description: Lamar Jackson beat out Josh Allen, and Ja’Marr Chase and Justin Jefferson are unanimous choices for The Associated Press 2024 NFL All-Pro Team. Saquon Barkley received 48 of 50 first-place votes and Patrick Surtain II got 49 from a nationwide panel of media members who regularly cover the league.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bay Area News Group girls athlete of the week: Nicole Steiner, Los Gatos basketball
item.description: Steiner, a senior, recorded the first triple-double in Los Gatos basketball program history, scoring 16 points, grabbing 15 rebounds and dishing 10 assists as the Wildcats beat Milpitas 61-29 to open league play.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: NFL moves Vikings-Rams playoff game to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL has moved the Rams' wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings to Arizona after days of devastating wildfires in the Los Angeles area. The game will be played Monday night at State Farm Stadium, the home of the Arizona Cardinals, in suburban Glendale.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz go cold in 97-92 loss to the Heat
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz just can't seem to find a way to be able to close out games at home this season. Tyler Herro scored 23 points and Jaime Jaquez had 20, including five in the final 1:03, to lead the Miami Heat to a 97-92 victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Penn State QB Drew Allar's late interception helps seal Notre Dame's win in Orange Bowl
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Drew Allar walked to the Penn State sideline with his hands on the top of his head, seemingly aware of where the College Football Playoff semifinal was heading.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Notre Dame QB Riley Leonard gets injury scare, returns to rally Irish into CFP championship game
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Riley Leonard took a big hit and got a big scare. He wound up ending the night with the biggest win of his college career — and now, a chance at a national championship.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck enters transfer portal and delays NFL draft plans, reports say
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia quarterback Carson Beck appears to be rethinking his plans for 2025, less than two weeks after announcing he would enter the NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles Rams' playoff game moved to Arizona as wildfires disrupt sports in Southern California
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The NFL moved the Los Angeles Rams’ playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings out of Southern California on Thursday, the biggest of several changes to the sports calendar after days of devastating wildfires in the area.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl champion Sean Landeta fumes at radio host over question about grooming habits
item.description: Former New York Giants punter Sean Landeta was furious after being asked a personal question about his grooming habits during a live radio interview Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lakers game postponed Thursday; coach JJ Redick reportedly loses home in Palisades Fire
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers game against the Charlotte Hornets scheduled for Thursday evening has been postponed as the community reels from the devastating fires throughout the city. The team announced the postponement on X on Thursday, stating that it'll be rescheduled to "focus on what matters most.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC loses to Stanley Cup champs, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to struggle at home, losing its fourth straight game at the Delta Center Wednesday night to the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard continues hot stretch, career-best point streak at 8 games as Blackhawks beat Avalanche
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard is on a hot streak, even if the Blackhawks haven't been too hot lately. Bedard continued his roll on Wednesday night with a goal and an assist, and this time it led to a win, as the Blackhawks beat the Colorado Avalanche, 3-1, at the United Center.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox sign former Seattle Mariners infielder
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox signed free agent infielder Josh Rojas Wednesday, according to a press release from the team. The White Sox agreed to terms on a one-year, $3.5-million contract with Rojas. Rojas spent the 2024 season with the Seattle Mariners, hitting .225/.304/.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: University City 61, Lincoln 59
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- What a game on the hardwood at University City in boys action with the Centurions beating Lincoln in double overtime 61-59. Dylan Griffin paced the Centurions with a game high 38 points.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Thune tees up Tuberville's bill to block transgender athletes from women’s sports
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) on Tuesday took the necessary procedural steps to place Sen. Tommy Tuberville’s (R-Ala.) bill blocking transgender athletes from women’s sports on the Senate calendar. The step sets up a vote on Tuberville’s bill in the weeks ahead.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: St. Patrick names former Notre Dame star Tom Zbikowski head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO — One of the best safeties in Notre Dame's storied football program was named head coach of Saint Patrick High School. Tom Zbikowski, 39, will take over the Northwest Side high school's football program.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Peter Seidler's brother responds to lawsuit over control of Padres
item.description: Matt Seidler, the brother of late Padres owner Peter Seidler, has responded to the lawsuit filed by Peter Seidler's widow over control of the team.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: LIV Golf fills out its 2025 schedule with final 3 events going head-to-head with PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf will play its final three events in the United States the same week as the FedEx Cup playoffs on the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Peter Seidler's widow takes legal action in fight for control over the Padres
item.description: The widow of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler filed a legal complaint Monday against two of his brothers in a fight over who should control the Major League Baseball team.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: North Central football team wins third Division III national title, finishes season a perfect 15-0
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The North Central football dynasty has reached rarified air. So has quarterback Luke Lehnen.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Bucs player Jordan Whitehead injured in car crash, out for Sunday's game
item.description: Tampa Bay Bucs safety Jordan Whitehead was injured in a car crash on Saturday morning, and will be out of Sunday's game due to his injuries, the Buccaneers announced.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls to retire Derrick Rose's No. 1 jersey
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday that the team would be retiring Derrick Rose’s No. 1 jersey next season. Bulls President & CEO Michael Reinsdorf made the announcement on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9
